mapper.sql: EXISTS ( SELECT B1.DEPTID FROM HR_DEPARTMENT B1 WHERE B1.DEPTNO = H.DEPTNO START WITH B1.DEPTNO IN ( SELECT HRD.DEPTID FROM HR_DEPARTMENT HRD WHERE HRD.MANAGER_EMP_ID = #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) CONNECT BY PRIOR B1.DEPTNO = B1.PARENT_DEPT_NO UNION SELECT ASI.DEPTNO FROM AR_SUPERVISOR_INFO ASI WHERE ASI.DEPTNO = H.DEPTNO AND ASI.PERSON_ID = #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.select: SELECT D2.DEPTNO AS DEPTNO, GET_DEPT_NAME(D2.DEPTNO, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS DEPTNAME, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM HR_EMPLOYEE H WHERE H.CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND H.EMPID NOT LIKE '111111%' AND H.DEPTNO IN ( SELECT SUB.DEPTNO FROM HR_DEPARTMENT SUB WHERE SUB.CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} START WITH SUB.DEPTNO = D2.DEPTNO CONNECT BY NOCYCLE PRIOR SUB.DEPTNO = SUB.PARENT_DEPT_NO ) AND TRUNC(H.DATE_STARTED) <= TO_DATE(#{weekEndDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY/MM/DD') AND (H.DATE_LEFT IS NULL OR TRUNC(H.DATE_LEFT) >= TO_DATE(#{weekEndDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY/MM/DD')) AND ) AS EMP_COUNT FROM HR_DEPARTMENT D2 WHERE D2.CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND D2.DEPT_LEVEL = 2 ORDER BY D2.DEPTNO

SELECT Q.TYPE_CODE AS TYPE_CODE, Q.POST_GRADE_NO AS POST_GRADE_NO, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(Q.POST_GRADE_NO, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS POST_GRADE_NAME, COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM ( SELECT 'JOIN' AS TYPE_CODE, H.POST_GRADE_NO AS POST_GRADE_NO FROM HR_EMPLOYEE H WHERE H.CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND H.EMPID NOT LIKE '111111%' AND TRUNC(H.DATE_STARTED) BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{weekStart, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY/MM/DD') AND TO_DATE(#{weekEnd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY/MM/DD') AND UNION ALL SELECT 'RESIGN' AS TYPE_CODE, H.POST_GRADE_NO AS POST_GRADE_NO FROM HR_EMPLOYEE H WHERE H.CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND H.EMPID NOT LIKE '111111%' AND H.DATE_LEFT IS NOT NULL AND TRUNC(H.DATE_LEFT) BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{weekStart, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY/MM/DD') AND TO_DATE(#{weekEnd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY/MM/DD') AND ) Q LEFT JOIN SY_CODE SC ON SC.CODE_NO = Q.POST_GRADE_NO GROUP BY Q.TYPE_CODE, Q.POST_GRADE_NO, SC.ORDERNO ORDER BY NVL(SC.ORDERNO, 9999), Q.POST_GRADE_NO, Q.TYPE_CODE
